sourceTitle: Syria Subnational Population and Housing Data Tables with Administrative Boundaries, Based on National Census and Surveys

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-uscb-population/hdx-uscb-population-package.json
rawFiles.notes: HDX package metadata for the U.S. Census Bureau Syria subnational population and boundary tables.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-uscb-population/Syria_uscb_201811.xlsx
rawFiles.notes: Original U.S. Census Bureau workbook downloaded from the HDX package resources.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-uscb-population/uscb-age-sex-records.json
rawFiles.notes: Locally extracted Age-Sex worksheet records used for ADM1, ADM2, and ADM3 2004 total population values.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-uscb-population/uscb-population-estimates-records.json
rawFiles.notes: Locally extracted Population Estimates worksheet records used for ADM1 2011, 2014, and 2016 population estimates.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-uscb-population/uscb-population-crosswalk.json
rawFiles.notes: Local crosswalk from U.S. Census Bureau NSO_CODE values to OpenSyria governorate, district, and subdistrict IDs, including reviewed manual mappings and skipped sentinel rows.

transforms: Downloaded HDX package metadata and the U.S. Census Bureau Syria workbook.
Extracted the Age-Sex worksheet and selected BTOTL as the 2004 total population field for ADM1, ADM2, and ADM3 records.
Extracted the Population Estimates worksheet for ADM1 records.
Stored populationHistory arrays where multiple dated measurements are available.
Set each record population field to the latest preferred measurement available at that administrative level.
Mapped ADM1 and ADM2 rows by exact NSO_CODE to externalIds.ochaPcode matches.
Mapped ADM3 rows by exact NSO_CODE to externalIds.ochaPcode matches where possible.
Mapped four Baniyas and Qadmous area ADM3 rows by reviewed Arabic names where the source vintage uses older NSO_CODE values.
Skipped ADM3 rows whose population value is the -999 source sentinel rather than a real population measurement.
Added the U.S. Census Bureau source ID to each updated record and to each population measurement sourceIds array.
reviewNotes: Imported 14 governorate population histories with 2004 census values plus January 2011, December 2011, 2014, and 2016 estimates; 61 district 2004 census population measurements; and 270 subdistrict 2004 census population measurements. Two Quneitra subdistrict rows, Al-Butayhah and Masaada, remain without population values because the source workbook stores -999 sentinel values for them. The 2026 U.S. Census IDB/PopClock value is national-level only and is not imported into governorate, district, or subdistrict records.
